TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Bsuring ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 321 buwan, 1,054 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,008 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 82%, Tayan 3%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bsuring hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Bsuring hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bsuring hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Bsuring hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Bsuring hya' ga Tpuqu. tay mkyahu' na Bsuring hya' ga Dowras. hmgiru lmosay Yasa rhzyal na qalang ki 'Tayal na blaq na llpyung mwah mcisal. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βs~ɕuriŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tpuqu. taj mkjaħuʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *owras~ɕ. ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj jas~ɕa rħzjal na qalaŋ ki ʔtajal na βlaq na llpjuŋ mwaħ mʦ~ʨis~ɕal. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Bsuring ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 321 buwan, 1,054 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,008 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 82%, Tayan 3%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bsuring hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Bsuring hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bsuring hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Bsuring hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Bsuring hya' ga Tpuqu. tay mkyahu' na Bsuring hya' ga Dowras. hmgiru lmosay Yasa rhzyal na qalang ki 'Tayal na blaq na llpyung mwah mcisal. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βs~ɕuriŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tpuqu. taj mkjaħuʔ na βs~ɕuriŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *owras~ɕ. ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj jas~ɕa rħzjal na qalaŋ ki ʔtajal na βlaq na llpjuŋ mwaħ mʦ~ʨis~ɕal. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
